info.name: Carouser
info.description: The Carouser Background from Astarion’s Book of Hungers.
info.author: Wizards of the Coast

ul.li: Tool Proficiency: Choose one kind of Gaming Set
Equipment: Choose A or B: (A) Dagger, Gaming Set (same as above), Fine Clothes, Glass Bottle, Mirror, Perfume, Pouch, Tinderbox, 19 GP; or (B) 50 GP

description.p: You grew to adulthood in the beating heart of a large city, such as Baldur's Gate. You spent countless evenings in taverns, playhouses, parlors, and gambling dens, savoring all the city had to offer. You're a natural at interacting with people to learn their secrets, whether over a high-stakes game or at a high-class soiree. You might have been thrown out of an establishment or ten, but only by people who don't know how to party.

setters.set: Dexterity, Intelligence, Charisma, Tireless Reveler Feat, Deception and Persuasion Skills, and one kind of Gaming Set
